chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.D-208 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025 Mr. Zafar Ali Malgani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh a/w Jawad Hussain Chachar, Circle Officer, ACE Jacobabad & Khan Muhammad Jamali XEN Education Works. -.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to process issued earlier Mr. Jawad Hussain Chachar, Circle Officer, ACE Jacobabad is present and files authority letter on behalf of Deputy Director ACE Larkana and statement together with other papers, taken on record. He hands over copy of statement to learned counsel for the petitioner. In his statement, the Circle Officer has categorically mentioned that in spite of repeated notice, the petitioner has not turned up for recording his statement. In such circumstances, instant petition is hereby disposed of; however, the petitioner if approached to concerned Circle Officer, his statement shall be recorded in accordance with law. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
